title: Egisto Olivieri

infobox.value: This article about an Italian film actor born in the 1880s is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Egisto_Olivieri&action=edit).

(1880–1962) was an Italian [stage](/wiki/Stage_actor "Stage actor") and [film actor](/wiki/Film_actor "Film actor"). He appeared in more than forty films during his career including *[The Little School Mistress](/wiki/The_Little_School_Mistress "The Little School Mistress")* (1934).[[1]](#cite_note-1) His final film appearance was in [Vittorio De Sica](/wiki/Vittorio_De_Sica "Vittorio De Sica")'s *[Miracle in Milan](/wiki/Miracle_in_Milan "Miracle in Milan")* (1951)
Goble, Alan. *The Complete Index to Literary Sources in Film*. Walter de Gruyter, 1999. p.344.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Italian stage and film actor

| Egisto Olivieri | |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
| Born | (1880-03-21)21 March 1880  Rome, [Lazio](/wiki/Lazio "Lazio"), Italy |
| Died | 4 March 1962(1962-03-04) (aged 81)  [Bologna](/wiki/Bologna "Bologna"), [Emilia-Romagna](/wiki/Emilia-Romagna "Emilia-Romagna"), Italy |
| Occupation | Actor |
| Years active | 1933–1951 (film) |

**Egisto Olivieri** (1880–1962) was an Italian [stage](/wiki/Stage_actor "Stage actor") and [film actor](/wiki/Film_actor "Film actor"). He appeared in more than forty films during his career including *[The Little School Mistress](/wiki/The_Little_School_Mistress "The Little School Mistress")* (1934).[[1]](#cite_note-1) His final film appearance was in [Vittorio De Sica](/wiki/Vittorio_De_Sica "Vittorio De Sica")'s *[Miracle in Milan](/wiki/Miracle_in_Milan "Miracle in Milan")* (1951)

## Selected filmography

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Egisto_Olivieri&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Selected filmography")]

* *[The Haller Case](/wiki/The_Haller_Case "The Haller Case")* (1933)
* *[Everybody's Woman](/wiki/Everybody%27s_Woman "Everybody's Woman")* (1934)
* *[The Little School Mistress](/wiki/The_Little_School_Mistress "The Little School Mistress")* (1934)
* *[Aldebaran](/wiki/Aldebaran_(film) "Aldebaran (film)")* (1935)
* *[Luciano Serra, Pilot](/wiki/Luciano_Serra,_Pilot "Luciano Serra, Pilot")* (1938)
* *[The Silent Partner](/wiki/The_Silent_Partner_(1939_film) "The Silent Partner (1939 film)")* (1939)
* *[Captain Fracasse](/wiki/Captain_Fracasse_(1940_film) "Captain Fracasse (1940 film)")* (1940)
* *[The King of England Will Not Pay](/wiki/The_King_of_England_Will_Not_Pay "The King of England Will Not Pay")* (1941)
* *[The Mask of Cesare Borgia](/wiki/The_Mask_of_Cesare_Borgia "The Mask of Cesare Borgia")* (1941)
* *[Carmela](/wiki/Carmela_(film) "Carmela (film)")* (1942)
* *[Love Story](/wiki/Love_Story_(1942_film) "Love Story (1942 film)")* (1942)
* *[Short Circuit](/wiki/Short_Circuit_(1943_film) "Short Circuit (1943 film)")* (1943)
* *[I'll Always Love You](/wiki/I%27ll_Always_Love_You_(1943_film) "I'll Always Love You (1943 film)")* (1943)
* *[Two Suffer Better Than One](/wiki/Two_Suffer_Better_Than_One "Two Suffer Better Than One")* (1943)
* *[Resurrection](/wiki/Resurrection_(1944_film) "Resurrection (1944 film)")* (1944)
* *[The Sun Still Rises](/wiki/The_Sun_Still_Rises "The Sun Still Rises")* (1946)
* *[Departure at Seven](/wiki/Departure_at_Seven "Departure at Seven")* (1946)
* *[Hand of Death](/wiki/Hand_of_Death_(1949_film) "Hand of Death (1949 film)")* (1949)
* *[Mistress of the Mountains](/wiki/Mistress_of_the_Mountains "Mistress of the Mountains")* (1950)
* *[Songs in the Streets](/wiki/Songs_in_the_Streets "Songs in the Streets")* (1950)
* *[Miracle in Milan](/wiki/Miracle_in_Milan "Miracle in Milan")* (1951)
